form.formComment: Returns from a ten weeks spell and hit the frame when last resuming, finishing third over 401m at this track. Must be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a ten weeks spell and hit the frame when last resuming, finishing third over 401m at this track. Must be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after box rise put in some awkward strides and lost momentum.
Came together midway through the turn to the back straight, losing momentum.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th over 340m at Bulli beaten 11 lengths (20.15) behind Towering Luke in a Grade 5 on March 31. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 7th over 340m at Bulli beaten 11 lengths (20.15) behind Towering Luke in a Grade 5 on March 31. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 320m at this track. Would be better placed in something easier.

form.formComment: Finished fifth (18.93) last start at this track. Prior to that had recorded five minor placings in a row. Awkwardly drawn and will need to find best.

formComments.comment: Finished fifth (18.93) last start at this track. Prior to that had recorded five minor placings in a row. Awkwardly drawn and will need to find best.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (18.62) when fifth over 320m at this track in a Grade 4/5. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and four places from 10 starts. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

form.formComment: Should get a clear run from the wide draw. Wasn't impressive last start but does have a great record at this track and distance, is a danger.

form.formComment: Missed the frame when fourth (18.96) at this track at last run and returns here after a three months break. Looks nicely placed and expected to go well.
